    DISCOVERY_GROUP_NAME - Static variable in class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt.MqttDiscoveryService
    Name of the group new, self-registered devices are placed into.
    DiscoveryMessage - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    Immutable representation of a device's MQTT DISCOVERY payload, by which a device announces (self-registers) itself and declares its transports and controllable commands.
    DiscoveryMessage(String, String, String, DiscoveryMessage.Control, List) - Constructor for record class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt.DiscoveryMessage
    Creates an instance of a DiscoveryMessage record class.
    DiscoveryMessage.CommandSpec - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    A single controllable command declared by the device.
    DiscoveryMessage.Control - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    The transports a device offers.
    DiscoveryMessage.MqttControl - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    MQTT transport coordinates.
    DiscoveryMessage.ParameterSpec - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    A single parameter of a DiscoveryMessage.CommandSpec.
    DiscoveryMessage.RestControl - Record Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.resource.control.mqtt
    REST transport coordinates.

    SecurityConfig - Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.config
    Security for the non-Keycloak profile, split into two filter chains so the stateless REST API and the session-based Vaadin admin GUI can coexist: REST chain (@Order(1)) matches /api/** plus the OpenAPI/H2 tooling and keeps HTTP Basic auth, exactly as before. Vaadin chain (@Order(2)) is the catch-all for everything else and wires form-based login through the VaadinSecurityConfigurer, redirecting anonymous users to LoginView. Both authenticate against the same local user store (the UserService UserDetailsService + the BCrypt PasswordEncoder from PasswordConfig).
    SecurityConfig() - Constructor for class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.config.SecurityConfig
     
    seed() - Method in class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.telemetry.TelemetryRuleGuard
    Seeds the cache once the context is up (a query needs the JPA layer ready).

    TaskScheduleService - Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.scheduling
    Orchestrates recurring TaskSchedules: computes their cron cadence and, when due, generates tasks from their template via TaskService.createScheduledTask(Project, String, String, int).
    TaskScheduleService() - Constructor for class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.scheduling.TaskScheduleService
     
    TaskSchedulesView - Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.ui.scheduling
    Master-detail admin screen for the recurring TaskSchedules of a project: a schedule fires on its cron cadence and drops a task from its template onto the project's blackboard.
    TaskSchedulesView(TaskScheduleService, ProjectService, CurrentUser) - Constructor for class de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.ui.scheduling.TaskSchedulesView

    Broadcasts telemetry transitions over MQTT so dashboards and devices see alarms (raised and cleared) live.

    TelemetryOperator - Enum Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.telemetry
    Comparison a TelemetryRule applies to an incoming numeric data point to decide whether it is in breach.

    A monitoring rule that turns a single telemetry data point of a Resource from passive history into active alarms.

    Creates an instance of a TelemetryRuleDTO record class.
    TelemetryRuleGuard - Class in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.telemetry
    In-memory guard that lets the telemetry ingest path skip the per-value rule lookup for resources that have no enabled rule at all — the overwhelmingly common case.
